{"code":"(def merged-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def prs-with-linear-closes (filter #(not (nil? (:closes_linear %))) merged-prs))

(defn create-verify-issue [pr]
  (github__create_issue
    {:repo "acme/web"
     :title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))
